message:
fix(drasi): trunk2 gets a dedicated column + trunks show flow dots (#7886)

Two issues addressed from production review:

1. top-losers → sse-stream line was hidden behind the spanning card.
   With the old 5-col grid, top-losers spanned cols 3→5 which covered
   the entire right trunk area; trunk2 was forced inside the card.
   Add a 6th column with a fixed TRUNK2_WIDTH_PX=50px width dedicated
   to trunk2, and make the spanning query stop at col 3→5 (cols 3+4
   only). trunk2 now always sits OUTSIDE every query card, so the
   q-out branch is a visible forward horizontal line.

2. Vertical trunk lines had no flow dots. trunk1 and trunk2 were
   pushed with active:false. Flip both to active:true and draw
   trunk2 bottom→top so animateMotion's natural forward direction
   matches the data-flow direction (queries → reactions travels up).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
